name: LinkGen
tagline: Smart WhatsApp links that actually convert
description: A branded link platform for Indian businesses: turn a raw WhatsApp number into a trackable, editable, professional short link with pre-filled messages and real-time click analytics.
features: Editable destination number — change it anytime, link stays the same

journey.title: The Problem
journey.content: Businesses were sharing raw WhatsApp numbers on ads and storefronts — unprofessional, untrackable, and a pain to update whenever a number changed.

journey.title: Core Redirect Engine
journey.content: Built the sub-millisecond redirect engine and link editor — one short link, an editable destination behind it.

journey.title: Analytics Layer
journey.content: Added a real-time click tracking dashboard so businesses could see exactly how their links were performing.

journey.title: Public Launch
journey.content: Opened signups with branded slugs and subscription plans — first paying customers came in within weeks.

journey.title: Where It Stands
journey.content: 80+ active users and 50+ paid subscriptions a month, running live in production with zero downtime incidents.

bannerPrompts: Hero banner: A sleek dark-mode SaaS dashboard mockup on a MacBook screen, floating at a slight 3D angle above a deep indigo-to-black gradient background. The dashboard shows a WhatsApp-green accented analytics panel with a line chart of link clicks trending upward, a list of branded short links, and a glowing WhatsApp icon. Soft cyan and green rim lighting, subtle particle glow, ultra-clean modern UI, product-shot photography style, 4k, high detail, minimal clutter, premium tech-startup aesthetic. 16:9.

App screenshot mockup: Close-up of a mobile phone screen showing the LinkGen link editor UI — a short branded URL at the top, an editable WhatsApp number field below it with a green checkmark, and a toggle for pre-filled messages. Clean dark UI, WhatsApp green accents, soft shadow under the phone, floating above a subtle indigo gradient background, product photography lighting, 4k, sharp UI text legibility implied, minimal and premium.

Analytics screenshot: A widescreen dashboard panel showing a real-time click analytics graph trending upward over 30 days, a table of branded short links with click counts, and a small 'Live' pulse indicator. Dark theme, WhatsApp-green and cyan data visualization accents, glass-panel card style with soft glow borders, 4k, crisp data-viz aesthetic, premium SaaS product shot.

Social share / OG banner: Wide 1200x630 banner with the LinkGen wordmark on the left in bold white type, tagline 'Smart WhatsApp links that convert' beneath it, and on the right a stylized WhatsApp chat bubble morphing into a link icon with green glow trails. Deep black background with soft green and indigo gradient glow, minimal, high-contrast, premium tech branding style.

name: BoomBuy
description: An affiliate deal-aggregation engine that scans Amazon, Flipkart and Myntra for live discounts and pushes verified deals straight to WhatsApp, Telegram and the web — the moment they drop.
features: Live aggregation from Amazon, Flipkart & Myntra
Category filtering — electronics, fashion, appliances & more

journey.title: The Problem
journey.content: Genuine discounts get buried across a dozen apps and marketplaces — deal hunters were spending hours scrolling for the same 5% off.

journey.title: Deal Engine
journey.content: Built the aggregation pipeline that watches marketplace pricing and surfaces verified drops as they happen.

journey.title: Multi-Channel Push
journey.content: Connected the engine to WhatsApp broadcast channels, a Telegram bot, and the public website for instant alerts.

journey.title: Where It Stands
journey.content: 500+ users rely on BoomBuy daily for verified, 100% genuine deals — growing purely on word of mouth.

bannerPrompts: Hero banner: A vibrant e-commerce deals app mockup shown on a smartphone screen, tilted at a dynamic angle, floating above a dark background with warm orange and gold gradient lighting. The screen shows a feed of product deal cards with bold discount percentage badges (like -60%, -40%), small marketplace logos, and a 'verified deal' checkmark. Sparks of confetti-like particles and motion blur suggest speed and excitement. Product-shot photography style, high contrast, 4k, energetic and premium. 16:9.

App screenshot mockup: A vertical smartphone screen showing the BoomBuy deals feed — scrollable cards each with a product photo thumbnail, strikethrough original price next to a bold discounted price, a marketplace logo badge (generic e-commerce icon), and a 'Grab Deal' button. Dark UI theme with amber/gold highlight accents, clean modern layout, product photography lighting, 4k.

Distribution screenshot: Split-screen mockup showing the same deal card appearing simultaneously in a WhatsApp chat bubble, a Telegram channel post, and a website card — connected by glowing orange broadcast lines converging from a central 'BoomBuy' logo node. Dark background, energetic gold particle glow, isometric-style layout, 4k, premium fintech/deals aesthetic.

Social share / OG banner: Wide 1200x630 banner with bold 'BoomBuy' wordmark top-left in white/gold gradient type, tagline 'Never miss a loot deal' beneath, and on the right a burst of discount tag icons (%, ₹ symbols) exploding outward with motion streaks. Deep black background, warm orange-to-gold radial glow, high energy, premium deal-hunting brand aesthetic.

name: EasyRestro
description: A full restaurant management system: QR-code dine-in menus, real-time kitchen order display, and waiter tools — with zero commission, unlike aggregator apps.
features: QR-code dynamic menus — no app download needed
Real-time kitchen display with order alerts
Waiter mode for manual orders from any phone

journey.title: The Problem
journey.content: Aggregator apps take a cut on every order and stand between restaurants and their own customers — owners wanted their data and their margins back.

journey.title: QR Menu + Ordering
journey.content: Built the QR-scan dynamic menu and dine-in ordering flow — works on any phone browser, no app install.

journey.title: Kitchen & Waiter Tools
journey.content: Added the real-time kitchen display with audio alerts and a waiter mode for manual table management.

journey.title: Pilot Onboarding
journey.content: 5 restaurants have already shown interest and are onboarding — full public rollout launching next month.

bannerPrompts: Hero banner: A modern restaurant tech mockup: a tablet showing a kitchen order display with ticket cards, next to a smartphone showing a clean QR-code restaurant menu with food photography thumbnails. Both devices float above a warm dark background with deep red and amber accent lighting reminiscent of restaurant ambiance. Steam-like soft particle wisps, subtle bokeh, product-shot photography style, 4k, appetizing and premium, professional SaaS aesthetic. 16:9.

App screenshot mockup: Close-up of a smartphone screen showing the EasyRestro QR-scan menu — a restaurant table QR code at top, a scrollable food menu with appetizing dish photography thumbnails, prices, and an 'Add to Order' button. Dark UI theme with warm red/amber highlight accents, clean modern restaurant app layout, soft shadow, 4k.

Kitchen display screenshot: A widescreen tablet mockup showing the EasyRestro kitchen display system — a grid of order ticket cards each with table number, item list, and a pulsing 'New Order' alert badge. Dark theme with red/amber accent glow, clean SaaS dashboard aesthetic, subtle steam particle effect in background, 4k, professional restaurant-tech product shot.

Social share / OG banner: Wide 1200x630 banner with 'EasyRestro' wordmark in bold white type top-left, tagline 'Own your restaurant's digital experience' beneath, and on the right a stylized QR code morphing into a restaurant table icon with warm amber glow trails. Deep black background, red-to-amber radial gradient glow, premium restaurant-tech branding style.

name: FutureClicks
description: Photographers upload live event photos straight to FutureClicks. AI face-recognition auto-tags every guest, applies trending live edits, and lets attendees scan, find and download their own photos in seconds — no scrolling through hundreds of images.
features: Live photo upload straight from the event
Trending AI live edits applied automatically
Guests scan a code to instantly find their own photos
Built for photographers to plug in and go

journey.title: The Idea
journey.content: Event photographers spend days sorting and delivering thousands of photos, and guests rarely find the ones they're actually in. FutureClicks automates both sides.

journey.title: Face Recognition Engine
journey.content: Building the AI pipeline that tags every guest across a live photo stream as images come in.

journey.title: Guest Discovery + AI Edits
journey.content: Scan-to-find photo retrieval for guests, plus automatic trending-style live edits on top of raw shots.

bannerPrompts: Hero banner: A futuristic event photography app concept mockup on a smartphone, floating above a dark background with vivid purple and magenta gradient lighting suggestive of a concert or wedding event. The screen shows a photo grid with a glowing face-recognition bounding box around one face, and a 'Found 12 photos of you' notification card. Bokeh light particles like a dance floor in the background, cinematic lighting, product-shot photography style, 4k, premium AI-tech aesthetic, sense of motion and celebration. 16:9.

App screenshot mockup: A vertical smartphone screen showing the FutureClicks guest view — a QR scan prompt transitioning into a personalized photo grid of one guest across an event, with a glowing 'AI Matched' badge on each thumbnail and a download-all button. Dark UI, purple/magenta neon accents, subtle bokeh light dots in background, 4k, premium AI event-tech aesthetic.

AI pipeline screenshot: A widescreen dashboard mockup for photographers showing an upload queue of event photos flowing into a face-recognition processing panel, with detected face thumbnails being auto-tagged and sorted into guest folders in real time. Dark theme, purple/violet glow, clean data-pipeline visualization style, 4k, premium AI-SaaS product shot.

Social share / OG banner: Wide 1200x630 banner with 'FutureClicks' wordmark in bold white/purple gradient type top-left, tagline 'AI-powered event photography, instantly yours' beneath, and on the right a glowing face-recognition scan grid over a silhouette of event-goers with camera flash bokeh. Deep black background, vivid purple-to-magenta radial glow, premium AI-tech branding style.

name: WhatsApyi
description: Connect your WhatsApp Business API and manage leads, campaigns and conversations from one dashboard — built for teams who run marketing and support entirely over WhatsApp.
features: Connect and manage WhatsApp Business API access

journey.title: The Idea
journey.content: Teams running marketing and support over WhatsApp were stitching together the API themselves — WhatsApyi packages that into one dashboard.

journey.title: API + Lead Management
journey.content: Building the WhatsApp API connection layer alongside lead and campaign management tools.

journey.title: Public Beta
journey.content: Opening up to early teams who want to run marketing and support fully through WhatsApp.

bannerPrompts: Hero banner: A clean SaaS dashboard mockup on a laptop screen, floating above a dark background with WhatsApp-green gradient lighting. The screen shows a conversation inbox with multiple WhatsApp chat threads, a leads pipeline in kanban columns, and a campaign broadcast panel. Soft green glow, minimal geometric background shapes, product-shot photography style, 4k, clean enterprise SaaS aesthetic, high detail. 16:9.

App screenshot mockup: Close-up of a laptop screen showing the WhatsApyi conversation inbox — a left sidebar list of WhatsApp chat threads with unread badges, and a right panel showing an active conversation with quick-reply buttons. Dark UI theme, WhatsApp-green accents, clean enterprise inbox layout, soft shadow, 4k.

Leads pipeline screenshot: A widescreen dashboard mockup showing a kanban-style leads pipeline with columns like 'New', 'Contacted', 'Converted', each with lead cards showing name, WhatsApp icon, and a small campaign tag. Dark theme, green accent glow, clean CRM-style data visualization, 4k, premium enterprise SaaS product shot.

Social share / OG banner: Wide 1200x630 banner with 'WhatsApyi' wordmark in bold white type top-left, tagline 'WhatsApp Business API, made simple' beneath, and on the right a stylized API connection node diagram linking into a WhatsApp chat bubble icon, glowing green. Deep black background, green radial gradient glow, minimal premium enterprise-SaaS branding style.
